title: Create: Switzerland
description: A Create mod addon that adds Swiss stuff such as better chocolate.
body: # Mod Status This mod is in standby. Do not expect frequent updates. If you have any suggestions for the mod you can join the discord server. # Installation Requirements This version of Create:Switzerland runs on Fabric only and is an addon for the Fabric version of Create Mod. # About This mod is a simple addon for the Create mod. It adds swiss related stuff such as chocolate. **Important:** In order to be able to see all recipes required, consider installing a Recipe Viewer mod. The vanilla recipe book will not be able to guide you through the experience by itself. # Development ### Developer _HackFight_ ### Artist _PadjokeJ_ # Localization Translations may be unfinished. - en_us (English US) by _HackFight_ - fr_fr (French) by _HackFight_ - ru_ru (Russian) by _Artur Amiryan_
